title: Slothar
content: {{Top|ca|leg|notoc=1}} {{Device |image= |name=Slothar |manufacturer= |model= |type=[[Music/Legends|Musical]] instrument{{InsiderCite|67|Who's Who in the Max Rebo Band}} |culture= |creators= |created= |modifier= |destroyed= |discovered= |owners= |locations= |cost= |value= |structure= |size= |material= |length= |width= |height= |weight= |protection= |capacity= |range= |inscription= |markings= |purpose= |heritage= |affiliation= }} The '''slothar''' was a [[Music/Legends|musical]] instrument that could be played by wagging it. Prior to his [[Death/Legends|death]] in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]],''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of "[[And the Band Played On: The Band's Tale]]," including the [[Death/Legends|death]] of [[Evar Orbus/Legends|Evar Orbus]], to [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]]. the [[Letaki]] [[Evar Orbus/Legends|Evar Orbus]], a [[Musician/Legends|musician]] who led a [[Evar Orbus and His Galactic Jizz-Wailers|Jizz-Wailers]] band, could wag a slothar better than anyone. ==Behind the scenes== The slothar was introduced in "[[Who's Who in the Max Rebo Band]]," an article written by [[Rich Handley]] for the [[Star Wars Insider 67|sixty-seventh issue]] of ''[[Star Wars Insider]]'' magazine, which was published on [[April 15]], [[2003]].{{SWArchive|url=community/news/2003/03/news20030317.html|text=Celebrate Jedi's 20th in ''Insider'' #67}} ==Sources== *{{InsiderCite|67|Who's Who in the Max Rebo Band}} {{1stm}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |nl=Slothar }} [[Category:Musical instruments]]
